title: centaurea mozaffarianii
intro: Centaurea mozaffarianii, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to Iran and is also known as Mozaffarian's knapweed. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Centaurea mozaffarianii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
